description: A grant administrator is conducting an audit and needs to confirm that all personnel paid from a specific grant have completed their mandatory effort reporting.

nodes.task_description: Identify the grant account to be audited.
Generate a list of all personnel who have received salary payments from this grant in the last fiscal year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully pulls a list of 5 employees.

nodes.task_description: Cross-reference this list with the effort reporting system to check for completion status.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that 4 out of 5 employees have completed their effort reports and flags the non-compliant individual.
